learning_backlog.observation: Reducing global section spacing improved some local geometry but caused downstream macro-layout regression.
learning_backlog.proposed_law_change: Do not alter macro section spacing outside a declared section-position law.

learning_backlog.observation: The lane required repo-local dependency installation before autonomous verification could run.
learning_backlog.proposed_law_change: Treat lane-local dependency closure as required before autonomous verification.

learning_backlog.observation: Desktop closure alone was insufficient; both canonical routes still needed explicit mobile overflow guardrails for footer, heading, authority, and CTA layouts.
learning_backlog.proposed_law_change: Require a mobile overflow falsification pass before canonical route promotion.

learning_backlog.observation: Generic product pages cannot be falsified against IMC-style fixed vertical positions without producing false regressions.
learning_backlog.proposed_law_change: Verify product pages by anchored hero geometry and section-flow groups.

learning_backlog.observation: Path-like metric values create avoidable overflow unless compacted before display.
learning_backlog.proposed_law_change: Compact path-like metric values before rendering metric cards.
